audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds via type system enforcement. The Blob parameter is a struct with fixed-size array (BYTES_PER_BLOB=131072 bytes). C type system, Go fixed arrays, and explicit size checks in Java (ckzg_jni.c:492-497,530-535) and Python (ckzg_wrap.c:292-296,360-364) bindings prevent wrong-sized blobs from reaching the function.
